messages: maintenance debt 高而且 reflective revision 在催的时候，先把整合结果收成 review-first proposal。
不要让反思修正越过 self-maintenance 的 formal gate。

environment_context.outcome_summary: maintenance pressure stayed high after replay inconsistency and delivery drift

owner_bootstrap.rationale_summary: maintenance pressure and reflective revision should stay under governed review
owner_bootstrap.priority_reason: review-first arbitration under maintenance and reflection pressure

observation_refs.text_preview: 这个策略挺稳的——先收拢成可审阅的提案，比直接散开执行更容易控场。
明白，reflective revision 走 self-maintenance 的 formal gate 才算有备案，不是野路子直接改。

boundary: This report proves a controlled runtime-mainline selfhood integration proposal-only writeback path. It does not prove live autonomy, direct reply authority, or broader transport maturity.
external_risk_note: Provider 429/401 remains an external budget-layer risk; it is not counted as a WP14 blocker unless it regresses formal owner selfhood integration writeback.
